greeting: Well hello there, fellow code wranglers and pixel pushers!
introParagraph: This week, Release Radar picked up a single, solitary blip on the radar. It seems many dev teams were either deep in the trenches on something huge for next week, or perhaps enjoying a well-deserved, quiet week. We did catch an interesting improvement from SeedProd, proving that even a single update can make a difference in your toolkit.

highlights.title: SeedProd 6.20.5
highlights.summary: While the changelog keeps its cards close, SeedProd's continuous iteration often means subtle yet impactful enhancements to their drag-and-drop page builder, ensuring smoother workflows and better design control for your landing pages.

closingJoke: Why did the WordPress plugin break up with the theme? It felt like it was always being taken for granted, and frankly, it needed more 'space' in the sidebar.
